title: Error handling workflow executed due to service unavailability
symptom: The error handling workflow executed unexpectedly, sending a notification without the expected execution data. The trigger output only contained the workflow and trigger objects.
applies_when: Using Google Sheets Trigger with polling
not_this_if: Error is not related to the trigger node
Execution data is present in the error output
root_cause: The error occurred during a polling operation of the Google Sheets trigger, resulting in a 503 service unavailable error. This caused the error handling workflow to execute, but since the error originated from the trigger node, the execution data was not populated in the output.
fix_steps: Review the configuration of the Google Sheets Trigger node
Ensure proper error handling for trigger-level errors
Consider implementing a more robust error handling workflow that captures both execution and trigger errors
agent_instruction: Check the Google Sheets Trigger configuration and enhance error handling for trigger errors.
